basic_details.job_title: Allahabad High Court – RO, ARO and Computer Assistant – 543 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: High Court of Judicature at Allahabad
basic_details.application_mode: Online only via https://exams.nta.nic.in/allhcre and www.allahabadhighcourt.in
basic_details.short_information: Allahabad High Court Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 543 vacancies for Review Officer, Assistant Review Officer & Computer Assistant posts. Candidates can apply online only from 01.06.2026 to 21.06.2026 through Allahabad High Court website allahabadhighcourt.in.

age_limit.age_details: To be announced after Stage-I result

qualification.education_qualification: Candidates who have served in the Territorial Army for minimum 2 years OR obtained 'B' Certificate of NCC shall be given preference, other things being equal.

selection_process: Stage-I: Preliminary (OMR) + Stage-II: Mains (Subjective) + Stage-III: Computer Knowledge Test (CBT)
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only; no other mode of application will be accepted. Only one application is to be submitted by a candidate for the post of Review Officer / Assistant Review Officer / Computer Assistant. Candidates are advised to fill out the Online Application Form well in advance and not wait until the last date.
seo_tags: Allahabad High Court RO ARO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 543 Review Officer, Assistant Review Officer & Computer Assistant Posts
